case_title: LAURA SANCHEZ et al VS. PATRICK RODDIE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-09-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT CONTINUES THIS CASE FOR FURTHER HEARING. PATRICK RODDIE IS ORDERED TO APPEAR WITH ALL NEGATIVES FOR PHOTOS TAKEN FOR MS. SANCHES AND MR. RAMIREZ. MS. SANCHEZ AND MR. RAMIREZ ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR WITH MR. RODDIE'S BURNING MAN PHOTOS. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. RELATED CASES: 831264 AND 831661 PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE TO BE RETAINED WITH COURT FILES. EXHIBITS ARE TO BE WITH FILES WHEN CALENDAR IS PULLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, LAURA RAMIREZ, TOMA AS TO DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-26-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PLAINTIFFS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED NOV-16-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY SANCHEZ, LAURA RAMIREZ, TOMA RODDIE, PATRICK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2010 - CONTINUED TO MAR-30-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. PARTIES ARE TO APPEAR AS ORDERED ON FEBRUARY 16, 2010. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, LAURA RAMIREZ, TOMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODDIE, PATRICK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, TOMA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2010 BY SAMUEL K. FENG. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ADVISE THE COURT OF SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO JAN-12-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-26-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2010 - JUDGMENT.
